chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1573 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No.7843/2023 (Urgent/App). 2. For order on Misc. No.7844/2023 (Exemption/App). 3. For order on Misc. No.7845/2023 (Stay/App). 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 27.03.2023 Mr. Muhammad Suhail Zafar Bhatti, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Petitioner on the strength of a letter dated 04.10.2022 has challenged the decision of syndicate in its 45th meeting that took place on 23.12.2022, whereby respondent No.5 was appointed as Assistant Professor of department of Islamia till further orders. Learned counsel was enquired as to what vested rights have been granted to the petitioner in pursuance of letter of 04.10.2022, as he was enjoying for the time being till the syndicate would reach to a conclusion, as referred above, and would continue to act accordingly, learned counsel was unable to respond to it. This is not a statutory appeal. Learned counsel is unable to point out any unconstitutional and unlawful error in the decision taken by the syndicate; hence the petition is misconceived and is dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
